title: caladenia × intermedia
intro: Caladenia × intermedia, also known as the intermediate spider orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross-breeding of two different species of Caladenia. This plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Caladenia × intermedia may include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant support. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
